'''Tront''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who worked for [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] under the command of [[Sol Mon]]. Tront hated [[Droid/Legends|droids]], and never missed an opportunity to damage or destroy one, particularly [[4/NG]].

Tront, like many [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards, wore a strap across his chest with an armor uniform underneath. He carried a [[Vibro-ax/Legends|Vibro-ax]] and a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 5|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 5]]
